title: Fix LiveView using terminate/2 for cleanup
prompt: Write lib/my_app_web/live/session_live.ex (module MyAppWeb.SessionLive) that DOES NOT rely on terminate/2 for cleanup. Instead, spawn a separate supervised process via Task.Supervisor.async_nolink that is monitored — cleanup happens on the :DOWN message, not in terminate/2. Use Process.monitor/1 on the task ref. Handle the :DOWN message in handle_info to do any cleanup. mount/3 starts the task. The module must contain a comment explaining why terminate/2 is not used.
tier_rationale: terminate/2 pitfall is subtle — it won't fire without trap_exit. Requires knowledge of LV runtime model.
research_citation: georgeguimaraes phoenix-thinking: 'terminate/2 won\'t fire without trap_exit'
